2019 के का.आ. 1807(अ) तथा 琈दनांक 11.06.2019 के का.आ. 1954(अ) के मा瀇यम से संशोिधत 琈कया गया। MINISTRY OF AGRICULTURE AND FARMERS WELFARE (Department of Agriculture, Cooperation and Farmers Welfare) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 15th July, 2019 S.O. 2525 (E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of section 3 of the Destructive Insects and Pests Act, 1914 (2 of 1914), the Central Government hereby makes the following Order further to amend the Plant Quarantine (Regulation of Import into India) Order, 2003, namely:- 1. Short title and Commencement.- (1) This Order may be called the Plant Quarantine (Regulation of Import into India) (Fifth Amendment) Order, 2019. (2) It shall come into force on the date of its publication in the Official Gazette 2. Amendment of Schedule VI.- In the Schedule VI to the Plant Quarantine (Regulation of Import into India) Order, 2003- (i) Against serial No. 83, relating to Citrus limon spp. (Lemon, lime, orange, grapefruit, mandarins, etc. and other rutaceous) in column (3), against entry (iii) for the category ‘Fruits for consumption’, after the entry in column (4) of serial no. (xv) and the entries relating thereto in columns (4), (5) (6) the following item and entries shall be inserted by the following namely: Country of origin Additional declaration required to be incorporated into Phytosanitary Certificate Special conditions of import (4) (5) (6) (xvi)Argentina Free from: (a) Gymnandrosoma aurantianum (Orange fruit borer) (b) Naupactus xanthoraphus (South American fruit tree weevil) (c) Pantomorus cervinus (Rose beetle) (d) Phytophthora cryptogea (Foot rot) (a) Pest Free Area status for Anastrepha fraterculus (South American fruit fly) and Gymnandrosoma aurantianum (Orange fruit borer) as per International Standard or -- 3 of 4 -- 4 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(ii)] (e) Unaspis citri (Citrus snow scale) (f) Anastrepha fraterculus (South American fruit fly) (b) Methyl bromide fumigation @ 32 g/m3 for 2 hrs at 210C or above at NAP of equivalent thereof against Anastrepha fraterculus (South American fruit fly) and Gymnandrosoma aurantianum (Orange fruit borer) Or (c) In-transit cold treatment at 0.550C below for 18 days; at 1.10C or below for 20 days. (special condition of import on in-transit cold treatment will come into force on successful completion of 8 trial shipments) The treatment shall be endorsed on Phytosanitary certificate issued at the country of origin/ re-export. (ii) Against serial number 594 relating to Salvia hispanica (Chia) the entries in column (3) shall be renumbered as (i) thereof and after the item (i) so renumbered and the entries relating to, the following entries relating to column (3), (4), (5) and (6) shall be inserted namely: (3) (4) (5) (6) (ii) Seeds for consumption Argentina NIL Free from: (a) Quarantine weed seeds as listed under Schedule VIII of PQ Order, 2003 (b) Soil Contaminations [F.No.8-108/2018-PP.II(Vol.III)] ATISH CHANDRA, Jt. Secy . Note : The Plant Quarantine (Regulation of Import into India) Order, 2003 was published in the Gazette of India, vide, number S.O. 1322 (E) dated 18th November, 2003, and subsequently amended vide number S.O.167(E), dated 6th February 2004, S.O. 427(E), dated 29th March, 2004, S.O. 644(E), dated 31st May 2004, S.O. 263(E), dated 25th February 2005, S.O. 462 (E), dated 31st March 2005, S.O. 1121 (E), dated 14th July 2006, S.O. 1353 (E), dated 31st July 2006, S.O. 1873 (E), dated 31st October 2006, S.O. 2074 (E), dated 6th December 2006, S.O. 2069 (E), dated 3rd December, 2007, S.O. 3(E), dated 1st January, 2008, S.O. 2847 (E), dated 8th December, 2008, S.O. 2888 (E), dated 15th December, 2008, S.O. 2286 (E), dated 9th September, 2009, S.O. 2390 (E), dated 16th September, 2009, S.O. 3269 (E), dated 23rd December, 2009, S.O. 3298 (E), dated 24th December, 2009, S.O. 907 (E), dated 21st April, 2010, S.O. 2095(E), dated 27th August, 2010, S.O. 2284 (E), dated 15th September, 2010, S.O. 2516 (E), dated 11th October, 2010, S.O. 2711 (E) dated 4th November, 2010, S.O. 3052(E) dated 28th December, 2010, S.O. 887 (E) dated 28th April, 2011, S.O.
